limit.description: Number of tweets to analyze Default: 20

token_filter.description: Filter tweets by specific token symbol for focused alpha analysis

min_tweets.description: Minimum number of high-quality tweets required for inclusion (not follower count). Filters out influencers with insufficient track record. Default: 5

limit.description: Maximum number of influencers to return. Default: 25

token_focus.description: Filter by specific token symbol (e.g., 'BTC', 'ETH', 'SOL'). Returns influencers who have tweeted about this token.

sort_by.description: Sort results by specified metric. Default: credibility

time_window.description: Filter influencers by recent activity. Returns only influencers who posted within the specified time window (e.g., '24h', '48h', '7d', '30d'). This addresses the issue of inactive influencers appearing in results.

token_symbol.description: Token symbol to analyze (e.g. BTC, ETH, SOL). Defaults to SOL when omitted; in that case the response includes tokenSymbolDefaulted=true.

days_back.description: Number of days of history to analyze. Values are clamped to the range 1 to 730 (out-of-range values are silently clamped to the nearest bound, not rejected). Non-integer values return a 400.

granularity.description: Aggregation granularity. Use 'total' for a single aggregate object, or a fixed bucket width expressed as <N>h (hours) or <N>d (days) for a time series, e.g. 1h, 4h, 6h, 1d, 7d, 30d. Bucket widths from 1h to 365d are supported. Time-series buckets are returned most-recent first, up to 1000.

lookback_hours.description: Hours to look back for trend detection Default: 24

limit.description: Number of trending tokens to return

granularity.description: Time granularity for momentum analysis. 'total' returns aggregate momentum ranking (single result set). Other values return time-series momentum data showing velocity changes over time. Time-series responses limited to 1000 rows maximum for performance.

token_address.description: Solana token address
